description: Create Notebook 07: LLM & RIG Preparation (Knowledge Base Construction). Builds structured knowledge base from model outputs, designs retrieval schema for different personas, and provides Azure OpenAI integration stubs.
steps: SECTION 1 - Load All Results: Load all CSV outputs from previous notebooks (umkm_clustered, cluster_profiles, government_priority, investment_opportunity, recommendations, credit_score_bands, policy_impact).

SECTION 2 - Location Profile Documents: For each kecamatan, generate a structured text document containing: name, kabupaten, coordinates, demographics (population, density, income), infrastructure scores, risk levels, number of UMKMs, average skor_potensi, cluster membership, recommended business types. Format as JSON documents suitable for embedding. Save as data/knowledge_base/location_profiles.json.

SECTION 3 - Cluster Summary Documents: For each cluster, generate a narrative summary: cluster name, description, key characteristics, strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, threats (SWOT). Include statistics and recommended actions. Save as data/knowledge_base/cluster_summaries.json.

SECTION 4 - Model Insight Documents: Generate documents summarizing: top features for location scoring, top features for credit risk, key findings from EDA, policy simulation results. Save as data/knowledge_base/model_insights.json.

SECTION 5 - Persona-Specific Retrieval Schema: Define retrieval schemas for each persona: (a) Bank: when queried about a specific UMKM or location, retrieve credit score band, PD, survival probability, risk factors. (b) Government: retrieve priority clusters, intervention recommendations, budget allocation. (c) Investor: retrieve investment opportunities, market gaps, growth potential. Design as JSON schema documents. Save as data/knowledge_base/retrieval_schemas.json.

SECTION 6 - Example Queries & Expected Responses: Create 5 example prompts for each persona with expected responses that would be generated by combining retrieved context with LLM. Bank examples: 'Apakah UMKM di Kecamatan X layak untuk KUR?', Government examples: 'Kecamatan mana yang paling butuh intervensi infrastruktur?', Investor examples: 'Di mana peluang investasi terbaik untuk sektor makanan?'

SECTION 7 - Azure OpenAI Integration Design (Code Stubs): Provide code stubs (not executed) for: (a) Creating embeddings with Azure OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002, (b) Indexing documents in Azure AI Search, (c) RAG pipeline: query -> retrieve -> generate response. Include configuration templates and API call patterns. Mark cells as non-executable (raw/markdown) or wrapped in if False: blocks.

SECTION 8 - Embedding Simulation: Using scikit-learn TF-IDF as a local stand-in for embeddings, demonstrate the retrieval concept: vectorize location profiles, perform similarity search for a sample query, show top-k retrieved documents.
SECTION 9 - Save Knowledge Base: Save all JSON documents to data/knowledge_base/ directory. Create a manifest file listing all documents and their purposes.
Extensive markdown explaining the RIG architecture, retrieval-augmented generation concepts, and production deployment considerations.
acceptance_criteria: data/knowledge_base/ directory is created with at least 4 JSON files
Location profiles cover all kecamatan (~627 documents)
Retrieval schemas are defined for all 3 personas (Bank, Government, Investor)
Example queries demonstrate practical use cases for each persona
TF-IDF simulation demonstrates retrieval concept working locally
Azure integration stubs are present but do not attempt actual API calls
verification: Execute the notebook: jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute notebooks/07_LLM_RIG_Preparation.ipynb --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=300 --output executed_07.ipynb --output-dir /tmp/
Check knowledge base: python -c "import json, os; files = os.listdir('data/knowledge_base'); print(f'KB files: {files}'); assert len(files) >= 4"
findings: Notebook executes successfully in ~10s. Generated 595 location profiles (from 553 unique kecamatan in umkm_clustered.csv, aggregated by kabupaten_kota+kecamatan pairs giving 595 unique combinations). 6 JSON files created in data/knowledge_base/. TF-IDF simulation works with cosine similarity retrieval. Azure stubs properly wrapped in if False: blocks. The models/credit_risk_model.joblib file was modified (shrunk) by a prior operation - not related to this feature.
